imports: from grok_web import get_client, PostDetails, VideoGenerationResult, ImageGenerationResult, VideoMatchResult
config.note: Tests are async (pytest-asyncio). generate.py does not support async, so test_workflows.py is hand-written following the same conventions.

scenarios.name: browse_and_favorite
scenarios.title: Browse gallery, inspect a post, and favorite it
scenarios.workflow: list_posts → get_post_details → favorite_post → list_posts(favorites) verify → unfavorite_post (cleanup)
scenarios.user_problem: User browses their gallery, finds an interesting image, saves it to favorites for later, then un-favorites when done
scenarios.skip_reason: Requires real Chrome and Grok credentials

steps.description: list_posts returns list of PostSummary with post IDs
get_post_details uses first post ID to get full details (children, media URLs)
favorite_post saves the post to favorites
list_posts(favorites) verifies the post appears in favorites

scenarios.name: generate_video_720p_10s
scenarios.title: Generate 720p 10s video from an existing image
scenarios.user_problem: User wants to animate an existing Grok image into a high-quality 720p 10-second video and verify the output resolution
scenarios.skip_reason: Requires real Chrome, creates real video (consumes Grok credits)

steps.description: create_video generates a 720p 10s video from the test image post
get_post_details fetches parent to find the new child video
delete_video cleans up the generated video

scenarios.name: generate_download_and_match
scenarios.title: Generate video, download it, then match the local file back to Grok
scenarios.user_problem: User generates a video, downloads it locally, and later wants to find the original Grok post from the local file
scenarios.skip_reason: Requires real Chrome, creates/downloads real video

steps.description: download_video downloads the video to a temp file
match_local_video identifies the Grok post from the downloaded file
delete_video cleans up the generated video

scenarios.name: text_to_image_to_video
scenarios.title: Create image from text, then animate it into a video
scenarios.user_problem: User has a creative idea, generates an image from text, then animates the result into a video — the full creative pipeline
scenarios.skip_reason: Requires real Chrome, creates both image and video (consumes credits)

params.prompt: A serene lake at sunset with mountains in the background

steps.description: create_image generates an image from text prompt, returns post IDs
create_video animates the generated image into a video
get_post_details verifies the video appears as a child of the image

scenarios.name: social_feedback_workflow
scenarios.title: Review posts and give social feedback
scenarios.user_problem: User reviews their generated content, gives thumbs up to good results and thumbs down to bad ones
scenarios.skip_reason: Requires real Chrome and Grok credentials

steps.description: list_posts returns recent posts to review
get_post_details shows all child videos for evaluation
like_post gives thumbs up to a good video
